title: Professional Status Bar
description: Inspired by Hypixel's Skyblock, identical status bar with advanced features.
body:
Provides information related to your HUD using digits rather than textures, inspired by Hypixel’s SkyBlock status bar. The text is placed above the hot-bar and below the action-bar (for example, it does not overlap with messages like “You can’t sleep now”). The displayed information can also change color or add extra text based on your current situation or active effects.

Your heart color changes if:

- You have Absorption: hearts become yellow.
- You are Freezing: hearts become aqua.
- You have Wither: hearts become dark gray.
- You have Poison: hearts become dark green.

Your armor displays extra text if you have an active Resistance effect:

- Resistance I = 20%
- Resistance II = 40%
- Resistance III = 60%
- Resistance IV = 80%
- Resistance V = "MAXIMUM"
- Higher than V = "MAXIMUM"

When you are submerged, an air indicator will appear after “Food”. If you have any form of immunity to being submerged, an extra text saying “IMMUNE” will be shown.

Command list:

/PSB toggle = turns on/off the status bar, this option is global and not per world.
